name: 6' x 9' Outdoor Rug Navy Stripe - Threshold™
description: Add some timeless flair to your patio, porch or deck seating with the Outdoor Rug Stripe from Threshold™. This all-weather rug is great for outdoor use, and it combines great style with comfortable cushioning underfoot and easy care (just rinse with a hose). This rectangular outdoor rug is decorated with white patterned stripes in triplets arranged on a navy background that will fit seamlessly into a wide variety of outdoor locations and decorating schemes. Plus, the striped rug has a spray latex backing to help keep it in place wherever you choose to arrange it.
